mappings.reason: Application allowlisting configures systems to explicitly deny unauthorized software execution, satisfying CFM-06's objective for software-related activities.
Library allowlisting configures systems to explicitly deny unauthorized library loading, satisfying CFM-06's objective for library-related activities.
Script allowlisting configures systems to explicitly deny unauthorized script execution, satisfying CFM-06's objective for script-related activities.
Data access control lists configure systems to explicitly deny unauthorized data access, satisfying CFM-06's objective for data access activities.
Host-based firewall with default-deny rules configures systems to explicitly deny unauthorized network traffic, satisfying CFM-06's objective for network activities.
Disabling unnecessary services configures systems to explicitly deny service activities, satisfying CFM-06's objective for service-related activities.
DNS filtering configures systems to explicitly deny access to malicious domains, satisfying CFM-06's objective for DNS query activities.
Network-based URL filtering configures systems to explicitly deny connections to unapproved websites, satisfying CFM-06's objective for web traffic activities.
Restricting browser extensions configures systems to explicitly deny unauthorized plugin activities, satisfying CFM-06's objective for browser activities.
Blocking unnecessary file types configures systems to explicitly deny unauthorized email attachments, satisfying CFM-06's objective for email activities.
Anti-malware software configures systems to explicitly deny malicious code execution, satisfying CFM-06's objective for malware activities.
Disabling autorun configures systems to explicitly deny auto-execute activities on removable media, satisfying CFM-06's objective for media activities.
Traffic filtering between segments configures systems to explicitly deny unauthorized lateral movement, satisfying CFM-06's objective for network flow activities.
Host-based intrusion prevention configures systems to explicitly deny host-based attack activities, satisfying CFM-06's objective for intrusion activities.
Network intrusion prevention configures systems to explicitly deny network-based attack activities, satisfying CFM-06's objective for intrusion activities.
Application layer filtering configures systems to explicitly deny unauthorized application traffic, satisfying CFM-06's objective for application activities.
